positive: A stylized, maximalist illustration of a celestial jungle. The main subject is a large, stylized lunar moth with iridescent wings, centered against a backdrop of glowing bioluminescent flora, exotic oversized pitcher plants, and hanging weeping vines. The composition should be symmetrical and highly detailed, using strong black linework mixed with vibrant, contrasting jewel tones (deep sapphire, emerald, amethyst, and electric gold accents). Use a Japanese woodblock print (Ukiyo-e) aesthetic crossed with modern graphic novel linework. The lighting should be dramatic and ethereal, with a strong halo effect around the moth and the plant highlights. Intended for screen printing on dark fabric. Isolated, clean silhouettes, perfect symmetry, highly stylized.
negative: blurry, noise, grain, text, watermark, logo, signature, jpeg artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, muted colors, gradient background, low detail, messy lines, amateur, photograph
